# CHNAI LAB Copilot Instructions

Read the assigned issue and root `AGENTS.md` before proposing or changing code.
Then read the repository `README.md`, `CONTRIBUTING.md`, `SECURITY.md`,
`docs/AI_AGENT_WORKFLOW.md`, `docs/REPOSITORY_STANDARD.md`, CI, package scripts,
Git state, and relevant source.

Before editing, report the outcome, product boundary, risk tier, likely files,
checks, assumptions, and stop conditions. Work only on the issue branch. Keep
one focused outcome, preserve unrelated human changes, use no secrets or private
data, run real verification, inspect the final diff, and prepare a draft PR
handoff that separates AI work from human verification.

Do not push to `main`, merge, change privileged settings, perform an R3 action,
or claim a human check or approval happened when it did not.
